metadata.description: This is a collection of product marketing skills and product knowledge for GreenNode AI Cloud products, designed to assist with product, account manager teams to utilize from product knowledge and product marrketing materials production.

plugins.name: strategy-skills
plugins.description: Skills for product marketing/strategist to produce marketing plan and strategy for GreenNode AI Cloud products, such as content strategy, event planning, free tool strategy, launch strategy, slide deck planning, GTM deck planning, and video content planning based on product knowledge and marketing goals

plugins.name: data-skills
plugins.description: Skills for product marketing/strategist to analyze data and generate insights for GreenNode AI Cloud products, such as analytics tracking, churn prevention, form CRO, onboarding CRO, and revops based on product knowledge and marketing goals

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: Skills for marketer to produce marketing materials for GreenNode AI Cloud products, such as product one-pagers, case studies, blog posts, and more based on product knowledge and marketing goals

plugins.name: product-marketing-skills
plugins.description: Skills for product marketing/strategist to create and execute product marketing initiatives for GreenNode AI Cloud products, such as product positioning, messaging, and go-to-market strategies based on product knowledge and marketing goals
